message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
A few days passed.
Since parting ways at Baked Apple Inc.,
I haven't even been in touch.
I can understand the feelings back then.
However,
is definitely hiding something from me.
What kind of powerful secret does Eva have,
that allows her to toy with
I'm really curious where that confidence of Eva's comes from.
I thought the gossip about Guy and Cindy was just rumor, but is it really that simple?
At least, during the party, Guy and Cindy seemed to have no connections.
Bam bam bam bam bam!
Ah, this noise is
the chaotic entrance of
The quiet time has ended.
Bang, crash!!!
The door flew open forcefully,
and entered.
Hey, hey Boss! This is not the time to be sleeping casually!
I always say this, but come into the office quietly in the morning. And, I wasn’t sleeping.
Oh come on, Boss,
said,
trying to hide the joy on her face, making a rather strange expression.
Did something happen?
Huh, you really seem clueless?

The office is as simple as ever, contrasting with the cluttered Chinatown.
However,
today's
what's gone wrong?
Is your plan to just stand here forever?
It's not like I want to take a good look at the room now, but having my view obstructed is tough.
With a
superior attitude, as if she's feeling all high and mighty. This girl really wears her emotions on her sleeve.
She looks down on me with an utterly exasperated face.
I wish she would sit down and talk sometimes.
I wonder if she's planning to stand all day.
? Well, that's fine by me.
Looking at her like this, I can't tell if she's young or grown-up.
They say women are monsters, after all.
Hehehe, it feels nice knowing something the Boss doesn't, doesn't it?
Well then, it's another day of work, right?
Boss!
I understand you're feeling down, but how about visiting Anna's house?
Even if we go now, I feel like she wouldn't be there.
No, she will be there!
How can you be so sure?
My instincts never lie!
You've been quite busy lately, huh?
Heh heh heh, Boss, you haven't been reading the newspaper.
What in the world happened? It wouldn't hurt to tell me.
If you kneel and lick my shoes, I might tell you.
I really don't want to know that badly.
Just kidding!
Don't take me seriously.
Boss, we've finally landed in Manhattan!
Landed?
A gigantic monster?
If a monster were to land, it wouldn't come to the office.
Is that so?
In that case, it would probably happily come to report. I wouldn’t, though.
That's why I said, Boss wouldn't come.
Ah, I see.
Haha.
Oh no, I've gone off on a tangent again.
Actually, you know, it came up during the party.
Came up at the party?
No way, the one we talked about?
Yes, that's right! Apparently, there's been a new case here in New York with the same modus operandi as that serial murder case.
So that means, it's a body missing some parts.
Yes! This time,
The story is that both hands are missing from the wrists.
Missing from the wrists?
I wonder what the killer is thinking.
What if I end up being a victim?
By the way, can't I meet Anna Skakki yet?
Well, you know,
you were looking at the results until yesterday, right?
I mean, you've been watching all night.
You need that kind of energy, you know!
In that case,
why don't you give it a try?
Oh, I can't! Lack of sleep is my skin's worst enemy, I can't do that.
Since then, I haven't heard from Meryl.
Even if I do hear from her, it'll be a problem. I still don't know anything.
That's true.
By the way, do you know Meryl's contact information?
Didn't you hear it?
Oh, I haven't heard anything.
This is troubling, what should I do?
Depending on how you look at it, it might be lucky, though.
I hope we can meet Anna soon.
What do you think about this incident?
I absolutely hate incidents like this. It's like hurting those weaker than yourself.
Yeah.
I really hate cowardly scumbags like this!
I think it’d be great if they caught the culprit and quickly put them to death.
Don’t talk about the death penalty so lightly. They might be a crazy person.
Only a crazy person would do something like this.
Anyway, I can't forgive this culprit!
Speaking of which,
have you met them?
No, I only saw them at the magazine company. Why?
Why, you ask?
I feel sorry for them.
You feel sorry for them?
Why?
Because, when someone is shocked and feeling down, not offering even a kind word is really cold.
Don't you think that's a really cold attitude?
Hey,
his lover is Guy, right?
But she was Boss's ex-girlfriend, wasn't she?
I can't take care of my ex's ex.
Huh?
What?!
Ah, I see! You're cold to those you got dumped by.
Listen,
that's not it, the issue of that article is between Guy and
them, right? It's not something for outsiders to meddle in.
Uh,
that's kinda
harsh.
He has always been strong-willed. If you care too much, you'll be resented. He'll call when he wants saving.
Is that really how it works?
Are you okay?
The hands of that serial killer are finally reaching New York.
If he's ignorant of the world's affairs, he might not qualify as a detective.
That overconfident attitude of his.
What on earth happened?
I've become oblivious to the world's affairs lately.
To be honest,
I feel like she is better suited for being a detective.
This girl gets information quickly, and though she seems silly, she's sharp.
She's surprisingly not to be underestimated.
When he feels superior,
his attitude looks down on others, and he scoffs.
I really dislike that.
I still can't meet Anna Skakki. Where on earth has she gone?
A week has passed since then, but there’s still no progress.
No matter what situation Anna Skakki is in, I have to get her to talk to make any progress.
I feel bad for her, but I want to move the job along quickly. Is that my ego?
Anyway, I have to get Anna Skakki to talk.
The culprit must have some purpose in dismembering the body. But what could that possibly mean?
Or perhaps, there’s no meaning at all, and they just want to collect only the beautiful parts of that person?
I really want this case to be solved quickly.
But, was I really so in love?
Did I love them?
When I was told that I was going to marry Guy, I was a bit unsettled.
I thought I wasn't worried about the past, but maybe deep down, there's still damage.
I was turned down during my student days.
was dumped.
Guy, she, and I were close friends in school. It was an unspoken agreement that we did everything together, three of us.
And,
while she was dating me, she was also dating Guy.
I learned this fact much later, and Guy doesn't even know that I was dating her.
didn't even know they were dating.
※※※ it's a bug ※※※
